privileged_info_summary: No metadata field found in task.json. Data is synthetic: CSV is generated by setup_task.sh with hardcoded plant data (Monstera, Snake Plant, Pothos, etc.) and strategic dates (Jan 2024) to create mixed priority levels for testing. The task itself is a legitimate houseplant watering schedule exercise using LibreOffice Calc with formulas (date arithmetic, TODAY() function, conditional IF logic), conditional formatting, and sorting. No real privileged information detected.
notes: No metadata field exists in task.json to audit. All claims and data analyzed from task description, shell scripts, verifier logic, and CSV content generation.
